Values[2]: All M.I.N.D.s are bred within the data tide known as the [<color=#34aff8>Phylotree</color>]. The consciousness of countless souls drifts as trickling points of light, ebbing and flowing through its veins.\nWhen the canopy finally flourishes, these lights ascend the branches, undergoing metamorphosis into complete [<color=#34aff8>Sefirot</color>].\nThe [<color=#34aff8>Sefirot</color>] condense civilization's most abundant [<color=#34aff8>information</color>], merging all beings into the canopy's fruit. This fruit will be entrusted to a chosen bearer, who will face the universe's ultimate Filtering.

Values[1]: The wonder of Phylotree is soon to be revealed.
